about_me: Software Engineer with 10 years of experience, including 6 years of commercial Android development. Beyond the core Android stack, I have hands-on experience with Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) and Ktor for backend development. My background spans Information Services, EdTech, Retail, and Enterprise sectors. I actively leverage automation tools and AI assistants (Cursor, Gemini, etc.) to optimize development workflows.
experience: End-to-end Android development (from scratch) and maintenance of large-scale legacy projects.
Architecting and implementing scalable multi-module systems with a strong focus on data security.
Extensive cross-functional collaboration: co-designing architectures, discussing UX/UI solutions with designers, and working closely with QA to isolate and resolve complex bugs.
Full-cycle team development: estimation, task decomposition, sprint planning, and API contract synchronization.
Mentoring peers, conducting thorough code reviews, and participating in technical hiring processes.
Conducting R&D and technical spikes for new technologies followed by preparing comprehensive technical documentation (Design Docs).
Full-cycle product release management: from CI/CD configuration and app store publication to developing and maintaining internal libraries.
